questionHtml: Suggest an advantage of the PEM fuel cell over the lead-acid battery for use in cars.
markschemeHtml:
liquid in cell is less/not corrosive
OR
does not contain lead/toxic chemicals
OR
larger energy density/charge capacity/current per unit mass
OR
does not have to be charged prior to use / is always ready for use «as long as fuel is available» ✔

meta.title: Suggest an advantage of the PEM fuel cell over the lead-acid battery for use in cars.
breadcrumbLabels: C.6 Electrochemistry, rechargeable batteries and fuel cells (HL only)
